summary: Hong Kong Disneyland functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong International Airport. Visitors often continue to Ocean Park.

Hong Kong International Airport functions primarily as a disperser in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland.

Victoria Harbour functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland.

Victoria Peak functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from The Peak Tram. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland.

Ocean Park functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland.

The Peak Tram functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Victoria Peak. Visitors often continue to Victoria Peak.
